examples.title: Explore A Page And Export Artifacts
examples.description: Visits a page, captures a snapshot and screenshot, then exports Playwright and ADF artifacts for follow-up automation work.

examples.title: Multi-Tab Observability Flow
examples.description: Opens multiple tabs, captures tab state, records network activity, and saves a screenshot for the primary tab.

examples.title: Operator Pause Template
examples.description: Launches a visible browser session, pauses for manual work, then captures tabs, console, and network activity after operator continuation.

examples.title: Test Session Recording
examples.description: Runs a browser test session with Playwright trace and video recording enabled so the resulting artifacts can be reviewed after execution.

examples.title: Passkey Flow On WebAuthn.io
examples.description: Registers, authenticates, and deletes a passkey against webauthn.io using the Browser-Actuator virtual authenticator flow.

examples.title: WebView Session Handoff Import
examples.description: Imports a governed mobile-to-browser session handoff artifact, restores browser state, and re-exports a round-trip handoff artifact.

examples.title: Android Runtime Session Handoff Import
examples.description: Imports the governed runtime handoff artifact captured from Android and re-exports a browser-side round-trip artifact.

examples.title: iOS Runtime Session Handoff Import
examples.description: Imports the governed runtime handoff artifact captured from iOS and re-exports a browser-side round-trip artifact.

examples.title: Web Runtime Session Handoff Export Template
examples.description: Navigates to a locally running Web app and exports the current browser session as a governed handoff artifact.

examples.title: Web Runtime Session Handoff Import
examples.description: Imports a governed Web session handoff artifact and re-exports a round-trip artifact for follow-up assertions.
